generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor collecting vehicle speed, position, and orientation data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance MotorSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor torque and speed signals"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorSignalData
]

instance SteeringServoSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing steering angle and torque feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoSignalData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorSignalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSignalSensor
]

instance SteeringServoSignalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSignalSensor
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data after clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance ProcessedVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized vehicle state data with standardized units"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SerializedMotorSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized motor signal data with standardized message types"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSignalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SerializedSteeringServoSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized steering servo signal data with standardized units"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoSignalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for clustering and tracking LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes sensor data, aligns message types, and converts units for cross-system compatibility"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CloudOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading for ACC-related tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles remote command execution for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight, DataReportingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCLeadVehicleDetection, ACCSpeedCalculation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control capabilities for ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of current vehicle speed, position, and orientation in 3D environment"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted vehicle trajectory based on current steering and speed"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracked objects from LiDAR point cloud data"
]

instance DataReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive data logs for system diagnostics and analysis"
]

instance ACCLeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using offloaded computation"
]

instance ACCSpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables Adaptive Cruise Control system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables Adaptive Cruise Control system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets target speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking command for vehicle safety"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle and environment"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for manual control inputs and system commands"
]

instance PhysicalTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle hardware"
]

instance DigitalTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital representation and processing components of the twin system"
]

instance UserInterfaceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User-facing interface for monitoring and control operations"
]

instance VehicleSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinComponent, DigitalTwinComponent, UserInterfaceComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Controlling FE are processed by the Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion. These commands are transmitted via ROS2 for intra-component communication and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity communication to the Actuation FE, which interfaces with physical actuators such as motor and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization with 100 ms accuracy is required across all devices for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Function Elements (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. These packages, containing ROS2 nodes, are organized into three entities: User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control mechanisms), and Physical Twin Entity (sensor/actuator data processing and automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking). Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity deviating from ISO 23247 by encompassing broader system resources beyond typical OME functionality."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP at the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system complies with ISO 23247, a four-part standard for digital twin framework in manufacturing. Part 2 defines the reference architecture with entities including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation into human-interpretable formats, and user interface interactions, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) specified as a protocol for implementation."
]
